task.label: Require verification of identity of customer and beneficial owner
Verify identity of customer and beneficial owner

conditions.condition: Before the establishment of a business relationship or the carrying out of the transaction

task.label: Allow verification of identity during establishment of business relationship

conditions.condition: If necessary so as not to interrupt the normal conduct of business and where there is little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing

exception.description: By way of derogation from paragraph 1

conditions.condition: As soon as practicable after initial contact

task.label: Allow the opening of an account

conditions.condition: Provided that there are adequate safeguards in place to ensure that transactions are not carried out by the customer until full compliance is obtained

exception.description: By way of derogation from paragraph 1

task.label: Carry out a transaction through an account

conditions.condition: Until full compliance with the customer due diligence requirements is obtained by Member States

task.label: Require compliance with consequences of inability to apply customer due diligence

conditions.condition: Where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements

task.label: Carry out a transaction through a bank account

conditions.condition: Where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements
Where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements
Where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements
Where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements

task.label: Consider making a suspicious transaction report to the FIU

conditions.condition: Where an obliged entity is unable to comply with the customer due diligence requirements

task.label: Apply the first subparagraph to specified professionals

conditions.condition: To the strict extent that notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors ascertain the legal position of their client, or perform the task of defending or representing that client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Require obliged entities to apply customer due diligence measures
Apply customer due diligence measures to new customers
Apply customer due diligence measures to existing customers

conditions.condition: At appropriate times on a risk-sensitive basis, including at times when the relevant circumstances of a customer change
